title: Chie the Brat
original_title: じゃりン子チエ 劇場版
overview: Chie Takemoto is a dependable girl who struggles to help her troublesome father run a small tavern in Osaka. Unbeknown to her dad, she occasionally visits her mother who left him not too long ago. She plans on trying to reunite them, but not until her father gets a job.

trailers.title: Chie the Brat (1981) Directed by Isao Takahata
